checks.name: lint

patternCompliance.notes: Each phase (imports, calls, heritage, symbols) is a separate module under scripts/context/phases/
All code uses stdlib only — no external dependencies
Tests written first (RED), then implementation (GREEN) for all 3 tasks
All SQL queries use parameterized placeholders (?), no string interpolation

performanceFindings.finding: _build_import_map issues per-row queries for source/target node lookups instead of JOINs. O(2n) queries where n = IMPORTS edge count. Acceptable at current scale but could be optimized with a single JOIN query for large codebases.
performanceFindings.recommendation: Consider JOIN-based query in future optimization pass

principleNotes.notes: 134/134 tests pass. Import resolution handles absolute, relative, from-imports, stdlib skip. Call tracing covers all 4 confidence tiers. Heritage resolves cross-file inheritance. Pipeline handles incremental indexing with stale cleanup.
All SQL uses parameterized queries. No user input handling (internal library). No secrets or credentials. stdlib-only constraint eliminates supply-chain risk.
Plan 03 has 3 tasks matching 10 changed files. SUMMARY.json records all changes. One ancillary file (test_context_graph.py) updated to fix Plan 01 stubs — justified and documented in SUMMARY.
_build_import_map has N+1 query pattern (per-row lookups). bisect-based caller attribution is efficient. All collections bounded by codebase size. Acceptable for current scope.
Clean phase separation following established pattern. Consistent naming (CALL_BLOCKLIST, _CONF_* constants). Each module has clear docstrings and single responsibility.

42 plan-specific tests + 92 pre-existing = 134 total. Covers edge cases: stdlib skip, unresolvable imports, blocklisted calls, global fuzzy, cross-file heritage, incremental skip/detect, stale cleanup.
All changes within context-graph feature. Only necessary update to test_context_graph.py (Plan 01 stubs). No drive-by refactors or feature creep.

evidence: Plan 03 goal: import resolution + call tracing + heritage + pipeline — all implemented
10 files changed matching plan task files[] (plus 1 justified ancillary update)
SUMMARY.json records all changes with descriptions
Workflow validation: 2 WARN (ancillary files) — expected and harmless
stageReviews.notes: Scope matches plan goal exactly. Contract artifacts complete. Memory phase progression coherent (discuss → plan → implement → review).

evidence: All SQL queries use parameterized placeholders
git diff --stat: 1736 insertions, 10 deletions across 10 files

findings.description: _build_import_map uses per-row queries instead of JOINs. Low priority — acceptable at current codebase scale.
_resolve_call docstring lists priorities 1-4 but implementation has priority 0 (self/cls) before priority 1 (same-file). Stale after reordering fix.

stageReviews.notes: Clean, well-structured code following established phase patterns. Strong test coverage with edge cases. No security issues. Minor performance note for future optimization.
